ai_summary: Affordable Robotic & Automation Limited's Board has approved a preferential issue of 1,093,750 fully convertible warrants to its promoter, Milind Padole, at Rs. 192 each, effectively converting a Rs. 21 crore outstanding loan into equity. This transaction significantly de-leverages the company by extinguishing a material liability, though it does not inject fresh capital. A potential red flag is the substantial increase in the promoter's fully diluted stake from 27.74% to 33.84%, consolidating control and diluting other shareholders, pending their approval via postal ballot.
